name: spot 1200 x
comment:
Elisium 1200 Aqua
Light Source
Lamp: Multichip 800W Led
Color Temperature: 2700K-6200K
Source life expectancy: 30,000 hours
Optics
Lens Diameter: 180mm
Spot: 5°～ 55°
Focus: Motorized Focus
Zoom: Motorized Zoom
Color System
Colour mixing: CMY colour system on 7 Color
Colour wheel: CMY + CTO ‘’ 2800K-5600K ‘’
Body
Material: High temperature and anti-UV ABS and aluminum
Body Color: Black
Transport: Two side handles
Device Locking PAN and TILT: Yes
Head Movement
Pan: 540º
Tilt: 270º
Pan/Tilt Resolution:
Packing
Professional 90 Degree Clamp: Including

Power Cable: TrueCon with Cable
Signal: Male / Female Connector ‘’ 3 pin & 5 Pin ‘’
Control
Protocols: DMX512 ‘’ Built-in Program, DMX, Master Slave ‘’

Short Mode: 36 Channels
Standard Mode: 36 Channels
Display: LCD Display
Dimmer / Strobe

Dimmer: 0-100% Electronic Dimmer
Strobe: Variable speeds (15 F.P.S at maximum)
Dynamic Effects
Profile Spot: Yes ‘’ 4 Plates. After cut, the pattern can rotate 180°

Fixed Gobo: 8 fixed gobos + open & 6 x Rotating Gobo + Open
Effect: High speed shake effect
Strobe Effect: Mechanical shutter and adjustable speed strobe effect
Frost: Motorized

Dimmer: Mechanical dimmer

Animation: Fire Effect Wheel
Prism
Prism 1: 4-face Rotating prism
